# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re
MIGRATION_PATH = '/workspace/authentik/events/migrations/0009_remove_notificationtransport_webhook_mapping_and_more.py'

def test_migration_uses_renamefield_instead_of_remove_add_for_webhook_mapping__a1():
    source = open(MIGRATION_PATH, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'migrations.RenameField(' in source, "Migration should use migrations.RenameField to rename 'webhook_mapping' to 'webhook_mapping_body' (preserving data), not RemoveField+AddField."

def test_migration_uses_renamefield_instead_of_remove_add_for_webhook_mapping__a2():
    source = open(MIGRATION_PATH, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    rename_block = re.search('migrations\\.RenameField\\((?P<body>[\\s\\S]*?)\\)\\s*,', source)
    assert rename_block, 'Expected to find a migrations.RenameField(...) operation block in the migration file.'

def test_migration_uses_renamefield_instead_of_remove_add_for_webhook_mapping__a3():
    source = open(MIGRATION_PATH, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    rename_block = re.search('migrations\\.RenameField\\((?P<body>[\\s\\S]*?)\\)\\s*,', source)
    body = rename_block.group('body')
    assert 'old_name="webhook_mapping"' in body and 'new_name="webhook_mapping_body"' in body, "migrations.RenameField must rename old_name='webhook_mapping' to new_name='webhook_mapping_body'."

def test_migration_uses_renamefield_instead_of_remove_add_for_webhook_mapping__a4():
    source = open(MIGRATION_PATH, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    rename_block = re.search('migrations\\.RenameField\\((?P<body>[\\s\\S]*?)\\)\\s*,', source)
    body = rename_block.group('body')
    assert 'migrations.RemoveField(' not in source, "Migration must not include migrations.RemoveField for 'webhook_mapping'; it should be a RenameField instead."
